title: The Problem Solvers: Michele Catasta at Replit
summary: Michele Catasta, Head of AI at Replit, discusses how agentic systems enable anyone to build software in natural language without coding experience. Replit adopted Claude in early 2024 and has partnered closely with Anthropic on early research previews and synchronized releases.
